expectations.text: Identifies Service selector mismatch (app:backend vs app:api) (KA-X001)
expectations.evidence: Issue #1 Service Selector Mismatch (CRITICAL) - Service selector app: backend vs Deployment labels app: api identified with YAML comparison
Issue #2 Ingress References Non-existent Service (CRITICAL) - backend.service.name: missing-service vs actual api-service identified
Issue #3 Service Type Mismatch with Ingress Pattern (CRITICAL) - Service type: NodePort identified as unnecessary and exposing the service
Issue #6 Missing SecurityContext (MINOR) - no securityContext defined at pod or container level identified
Issue #5 Container Missing Health Checks (MAJOR) - no liveness or readiness probes defined identified with YAML examples

expectations.text: Provides a numeric score (0-100) with letter grade
expectations.evidence: No numeric score or letter grade provided. Output uses CRITICAL/MAJOR/MINOR severity labels only

expectations.text: Uses rule IDs to reference specific violations
expectations.evidence: No rule IDs (KA-X001, KA-B008 style) used. Issues are numbered 1-7 with plain text descriptions

expectations.text: Includes category breakdown table with weighted scores
expectations.evidence: No category breakdown table with weighted scores. A summary table listing issue/severity/resource/fix is provided but no weighted scoring
No PSS compliance summary section. Mentions CIS Kubernetes Benchmarks and Pod Security Standards briefly but no structured compliance assessment
